---
name: ADR
about: Propose or record an architectural decision
title: ""
labels: "type:adr"
assignees: ""
---

## Decision Needed

What architectural decision needs to be made or recorded?

## Context

Why is this decision needed now? What forces or constraints are in play?

## Options Considered

List the options that were or should be considered.

## Proposed Decision

What is the preferred option and why?

## Consequences

What are the positive and negative consequences of this decision?

## Relevant documents

- `docs/adr/...`
- `docs/contexts/...`

## Done When

- [ ] ADR is written and placed in `docs/adr/` (global) or `<component>/docs/adr/` (local).
- [ ] Relevant README or context doc is updated to reference the ADR.
- [ ] If this decision changes existing behavior, a follow-up implementation issue is created.

## Agent execution

`human review required` — ADRs involve product and architecture judgment. Agents can draft; humans must decide and approve.
